title: Deltamod
description: A mod designed to replicate items, blocks, and functions from the tbotv arg.
body:
**A mod designed to replicate a few things such as items, blocks, and functions from the TBOTV arg which includes the channels mark101 and TLPA.**

A mod designed for making fanmade mark101 related videos using the blockbuster mod.

Please credit me and the TBOTV channels when using this mod for any of your projects.

You need optifine for the skybox to work.

**Do not gamejack, make sure you make it known that the videos you make with this mod are not apart of the TBOTV/mark101 arg.**

Every block in this mod is a prop, it will most likely not have any use other than filmmaking.
